Work With Us

Join the Studio

Careers

We're building great games and we need great people. If you're passionate about games and craft, we'd love to hear from you.

EngineeringFull-time / Remote

Unity Game Developer

Apply Now

Build and ship gameplay systems for our upcoming releases. C#, Unity 6, and strong game feel sense required.

  • 3+ years Unity experience
  • Strong C# skills
  • Shipped at least one game
  • Passion for game design
ArtContract / Remote

3D Environment Artist

Apply Now

Create stunning environments for our games and asset packs. Blender, Substance Painter and UE5 experience preferred.

  • Portfolio of shipped environments
  • Blender proficiency
  • Substance Painter
  • Trim sheet workflow knowledge
DesignPart-time / Remote

Game Designer

Apply Now

Design and iterate on gameplay systems, levels, and player experiences. Strong analytical and documentation skills required.

  • Game design portfolio
  • Strong analytical thinking
  • Experience with GDD writing
  • Familiarity with playtesting

Don't See Your Role?

We accept open applications. Tell us who you are, what you do, and why you want to join Fluke.

Send Open Application
